dependencies.name: openssl
dependencies.$comment: libcrypto is linked by third_party/sqlcipher (amalgamation) and comes in transitively via liboqs anyway. Declared explicitly so it doesn't depend on the transitive graph.

dependencies.name: nlohmann-json
dependencies.$comment: Header-only JSON used by core/ (replaces QJsonDocument/QJsonObject). Cross-platform, tiny.

p2p.description: Direct peer-to-peer transport (QUIC over ICE). On Windows this adds an MSVC dependency via msquic.

tests.description: Unit + integration tests for core/. Pulls GoogleTest. Enabled when -DBUILD_TESTS=ON (default for desktop, OFF for iOS).
